operational_boundaries.control_reason: The LINE Bot notify entities send messages to real people and groups through LINE's cloud service: a sent message cannot be unsent and reaches recipients outside the home. An agent should confirm before sending. (The integration's other entities are read-only monthly message-quota sensors.)

privacy_classification.privacy_note: Sending a notification delivers the message text to LINE recipients (users or groups) through LINE's cloud, so the message content and the act of contacting those people leave the home to a third party.
